name: TYPO3 Multi-Site Deployment
description: Deploy multi-language TYPO3 sites by cloning base installation for French variant
prompts: Clone app {{APP_0_ID}} to create the French language site variant with description 'TYPO3 French Site {{RUN_ID}}'
Create a new MySQL database in project {{PROJECT_ID}} with description 'TYPO3 French DB {{RUN_ID}}' version 8.0 for the French site
Create a virtualhost for domain typo3-fr-{{RUN_ID}}.example.com in project {{PROJECT_ID}}
Verify the multi-site setup by listing all apps in project {{PROJECT_ID}} and showing virtualhost configuration
